 <{%bold%}><{%fg 2%}>+ <{%reset%}> urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:pulumi:Stack::test-test <{%bold%}><{%fg 2%}>creating<{%reset%}> 
 <{%bold%}><{%fg 2%}>= <{%reset%}> urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::resB <{%bold%}><{%fg 2%}>importing<{%reset%}> 
 <{%fg 2%}>= <{%reset%}> urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::resB <{%fg 2%}>imported<{%reset%}> 
 <{%fg 2%}>+ <{%reset%}> urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:pulumi:Stack::test-test <{%fg 2%}>created<{%reset%}>

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 1 created<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>= 1 imported<{%reset%}>
    <{%bold%}>2 changes<{%reset%}>
